E H L S T W 

E

equals(Object) - Method in class textCo.Word
Checks equality based on string content.

H

hashCode() - Method in class textCo.Word
Returns a hash code based on the string value of the word.

L

Letter - Class in textCo
Represents a single character (letter).
Letter(char) - Constructor for class textCo.Letter
Constructs a Letter from a character.
letter - Variable in class textCo.Letter
The character value of this letter.
letters - Variable in class textCo.Word
The letters that make up this word.

S

Sentence - Class in textCo
Represents a sentence as an array of Word objects.
Sentence(String) - Constructor for class textCo.Sentence
Constructs a Sentence by splitting a string on whitespace and punctuation.
sentences - Variable in class textCo.Text
The sentences that make up this text.

T

Text - Class in textCo
Represents a full text as an array of Sentence objects.
Text(String) - Constructor for class textCo.Text
Constructs a Text by normalizing whitespace and splitting into sentences.
textCo - package textCo
 
toString() - Method in class textCo.Letter
Returns the character as a string.
toString() - Method in class textCo.Sentence
Returns the sentence as a plain string with words separated by spaces.
toString() - Method in class textCo.Text
Returns the full text as a plain string with sentences separated by spaces.
toString() - Method in class textCo.Word
Returns the word as a plain string.

W

Word - Class in textCo
Represents a word as an array of Letter objects.
Word(String) - Constructor for class textCo.Word
Constructs a Word by splitting a string into individual letters.
words - Variable in class textCo.Sentence
The words that make up this sentence.
